room.caption: [NGCLCH] Incoming plot.

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=128 newMapY=640 toRoom=rNGC_LC_I image_xscale=4 newArrowPosX=24 newArrowPosY=48 if global.gameProgress<=3290 {y-=80}
boxSize=0 stringToShow="" image_xscale=-1 image_speed=0.2 if global.gameProgress>=3300 {instance_destroy()}
